productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Veska PK Mid White Casual Shoes
description: With a classic leather build and featuring a Vespa monogram graphic on the outsole, the Vespa PK Mid from adidas originals is a vintage shoe with preppy-inspired details. UpperSynthetic leather upper with patented adidas 3-Stripes on the sidesSynthetic leather overlays as tow box foxing and heel cup for enhanced durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar with a pull loop to provide optimum fit, easy on and off, and to hang the shoes from a backpackPerforations around the mid-ankle collar for breathable comfort and better support to the lower legPadded footbed for all-day comfortCollection badge on the lateral heelMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style OutsoleTPR outsole with Vespa monogram graphic grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
